figures.caption: Figure 1. Cu availability is required for adaptive thermogenesis and is dynamically increased in thermogenic adipose tissue.
Figure 2. Adipocyte CTR1 is required for Cu homeostasis and thermogenic adaptation.
Figure 3. Adipocyte Cu deficiency impairs mitochondrial oxidative metabolism and lipid utilization in BAT and iWAT.

Figure 4. The Cu ionophore elesclomol rescues thermogenic defects in ACKO mice. (a) Rectal body temperature of Ctr1-floxed and ACKO mice treated with vehicle (Veh) or elesclomol (ES) during acute cold exposure (4°C). ES treatment improved cold tolerance (twoway ANOVA, treatment effect *P < 0.05; n = 3–4 per group). (b) Representative H&E staining of BAT from Ctr1-floxed and ACKO mice treated with Veh or ES under CE. Scale bar, 50 μm.
